ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model sold */,
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership that made the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_month" INTEGER /* Month of the sale */,
  "sale_year" INTEGER /* Year of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated from the sale */,
  "profit" TEXT /* Profit made from the sale */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the sale was made (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., new, used) */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., individual, business) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sale_year FOREIGN KEY ("sale_year") REFERENCES years ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sale_date FOREIGN KEY ("sale_date") REFERENCES dates ("date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sale_month FOREIGN KEY ("sale_month") REFERENCES months ("month_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_dealer_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealer_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the car */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the model (e.g., SUV, truck) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the model (e.g., compact SUV, full-size truck) */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., gasoline, diesel) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., gasoline, diesel, electric) */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dealerships" (
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dealership */,
  "dealer_name" TEXT /* Name of the dealership */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the dealership */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the dealership */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the dealership */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the dealership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dealer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_performance" (
  "sale_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales performance record */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Sales performance metric (e.g., revenue, profit) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the sales performance metric */,
  "target" TEXT /* Target value for the sales performance metric */,
  "percentage_achieved" TEXT /* Percentage achieved of the target value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue record */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Revenue amount */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the revenue (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profit" (
  "profit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profit record */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Profit amount */,
  "margin" TEXT /* Profit margin (as a percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profit_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dealership_regions" (
  "dealership_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dealership region */,
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dealership_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dealership_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dealership_regions_dealer_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealer_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_categories" (
  "model_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model category */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_categories_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_subcategories" (
  "model_subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model subcategory */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_subcategories_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_trends" (
  "sales_trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales trend */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Sales trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sales trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sales trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "market_analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market analysis record */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale */,
  "analysis" TEXT /* Market analysis (e.g., competitor analysis, customer analysis) */,
  "insights" TEXT /* Insights from the market analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitors" (
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competitor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the competitor */,
  "market_share" TEXT /* Market share of the competitor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "customer_segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer segment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the customer segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segment_sales" (
  "customer_segment_sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer segment sale */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale */,
  "customer_segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer segment */,
  "sales_amount" TEXT /* Sales amount for the customer segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_segment_sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segment_sales_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segment_sales_customer_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segments ("customer_segment_id")
)
column_names: ID of the dealership that made the sale
